name: Horizontal Rectangular High-Pressure Steam Sterilizer
description: Rectangular CSSD steam sterilizer with BIS IS 3829 Part 1 coverage, PC-based cycle automation, SS-316 chamber construction, and enquiry-led sizing, tray, trolley, and documentation options.

name: Horizontal Cylindrical High-Pressure Steam Sterilizer
description: Cylindrical 556 L-class high-pressure steam sterilizer with BIS IS 3829 Part 1 coverage, programmable PC-based automation, SS-316L chamber surfaces, and configurable heating load.

name: Horizontal High-Speed Steam Sterilizer
description: BIS IS 3829 Part 2 high-speed horizontal sterilizer for faster instrument turnaround, with 134 C operation, 30 psi pressure range, fast exhaust capability, and PC-based records.

name: Fully Automatic Vertical Autoclave
description: Fully automatic vertical autoclave range from 75 to 100 L with microprocessor PID control, 121 C operation, SS-304 construction, and compact lab or clinic footprint.

name: Bowl & Utensil Sterilizer
description: OT bowl and utensil sterilizer with 100 L indicative capacity, SS-316 heavy-gauge body, pedal-operated dome lid, perforated tray, 9 kW heating, and low-water protection.

name: Fully Automatic Hot & Cold Water Pressure Sterilizer
description: Fully automatic twin-shell hot and cold water pressure sterilizer with 10, 15, and 20 gallon options, 121-125 C operation, microprocessor/PLC control, and serviceable SS construction.
